# Mid-Valley Facility Services LLC

> Licensed, insured, locally owned cleaning and janitorial company based in Albany, Oregon, serving homes, businesses, and government buildings across the Mid-Willamette Valley.

## Services

- **House cleaning** — recurring (weekly / bi-weekly), deep and spring cleans, move-in / move-out, kitchens and baths.
- **Commercial & office cleaning** — janitorial for offices, retail, and medical or professional spaces; nightly or weekly schedules.
- **Government & public building cleaning** — licensed, insured, background-checked crews for city, county, and state facilities; contract-ready.

## Why Mid-Valley

- Licensed and fully insured for both residential clients and public contracts.
- Locally owned and operated in the Mid-Willamette Valley; one point of contact.
- Eco-friendly, people- and pet-safe cleaning products and methods.
- Vetted, background-checked, uniformed crews.

## Service area

Albany, Corvallis, Lebanon, Tangent, Millersburg, Jefferson, Sweet Home, Philomath, Salem area, and Brownsville, Oregon.

## Contact

- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8am–5pm PT
- Free, no-obligation on-site walkthrough for every quote.
